channel.title: ChatGPT on huoshan12345's blog
channel.description: Recent content in ChatGPT on huoshan12345's blog

item.title: Debugging Why OpenClash Made ChatGPT Painfully Slow: From DNS to TCP Fingerprints
item.description: A full debugging write-up of how OpenClash made the ChatGPT web app extremely slow, covering DNS checks, HAR analysis, nftables rules, and TCP fingerprinting.
